title: QR Code Subitem status change automation
excerpt: I am looking for a way to have a QR code scan trigger the status change of a subitem. I have only seen one integration for this but it does not have the ability to update subitem status’s. Would anyone know if this would…

posts.author: scubaguyo (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for a way to have a QR code scan trigger the status change of a subitem. I have only seen one integration for this but it does not have the ability to update subitem status’s. Would anyone know if this would be possible in integromat/Make or another platform?

Trying to find all possible options before having to look for a developer.

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @scubaguyo - If you’re still looking for a solution, the QR Item Tracker app on monday.com now supports this exact scenario with a ready-made integration recipe that updates subitem statuses via QR code scan.

Discover how it works here: QR Code automation for subitem status change on monday.com

a QR code scan trigger the status change of a subitem810×578 49.1 KB

Feel free to explore it with our 14-day free trial, and we’re happy to walk you through it anytime, just reach out!
